description: Pulses a one-hit barrier onto nearby allies.
tooltipTemplate: Every {intervalSeconds:0}s, allies within {radiusPixels} gain a barrier that fully negates the next damage instance. Barrier lasts {protectionDurationSeconds:0}s and does not stack.
Every {intervalSeconds:0}s, allies within {radiusPixels} are healed for {healAmount}. Fires even at full HP so future heal-trigger effects can react.

description: Nearby allies gain bonus movement speed. Additional Clerics add a smaller stacking bonus.
tooltipTemplate: Allies within {radiusPixels} gain +{moveSpeedMultiplier%} movement speed. Each additional covering Cleric adds +{stackBonus%}.

description: Strengthens Greater Heal and heal-triggered effects.
tooltipTemplate: Greater Heal and Restoration Aura heal for {healMultiplier:1}× the base amount. Heal-triggered buffs (Battle Prayer, Bolstering Prayer) have {triggeredEffectMultiplier:1}× strength and duration.
